commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For out of Jerusalem shall go forth a remnant, and they that escape out of mount Zion: the zeal of the LORD of hosts shall do this. These shall repeople the land. In a higher sense, the Christian Church was propagated by the few Jews who believed. (Calmet) Zeal, or ardent love. (Menochius) Of hosts, is added in the Protestant version, as being deficient in the Hebrew. (Haydock) It is found in several manuscripts. (Kennicott).
